Home.Body:
YAAAAWWWWWWWNNNNNNNN
Good morning world, and all who inhabit it!
Let's go outside, and see what's up in this ant world! (you're an ant, by the way.)

Outside House.Body:
A guard is standing at your doorstep as you exit your home.
"HEY YOU! You've been enlisted in the military. Your task is to find food for the colony."

Wilderness.Body:
You step outside of your colony, scared of what dangers might face you.
But you need to find food for the colony, and your queen!
You see two pathways, one with tall grass ahead, and the other opening out into a large field.

Tall Grass.Body:
You go into the tall grass, and find some food!
It doesn't look like it'll be enough right now... you can either carry it back home now or search for a larger piece of food.

Taller Grass.Body: Oh no! There's an anteater! Hopefully you have something to fend it off...

Intimidate.Body: The anteater didn't like that. It steps closer, as if wanting to eat you!

Field.Body: You see a purple flower a bit of a ways in the distance. Do you go get it?

Get Flower.Body: You got the flower! It's getting dark though, maybe you should head back.

Home2.Body:
YAAAAWWWWWWWNNNNNNNN
Good morning world, and all who inhabit it!
Another day in the colony! Let's go outside.

Wilderness2.Body:
You step outside of your colony, scared of what dangers might face you.
But you need to find food for the colony, and your queen!
You see two pathways, one with tall grass ahead, and the other opening out into a large field.

Tall Grass2.Body: You go into the tall grass. Do you want to head back, or continue looking for a larger piece of food?

Taller Grass2.Body: Oh no! There's an anteater! Hopefully you have something to fend it off...

Intimidate2.Body: The anteater didn't like that. It steps closer, as if wanting to eat you!

Use Flower.Body:
The anteater runs off.
You did it! Good job!
And look, theres a large piece of food here too! Let's take it back to the colony.

Field2.Body: You see a purple flower a bit of a ways in the distance. Do you go get it?

Get Flower2.Body: You got the flower! It's getting dark though, maybe you should head back.

Bad Ending.Body: You didn't get enough food for the colony!

Good Ending.Body: You did it! Your colony survives another season.
